summary: Automated Business Valuation Module - 18/18 backend tests passed. Frontend wizard flow verified after fixing Badge import bug. Full valuation calculation with AI analysis working.

ui_bugs.issue: Missing Badge import causing runtime error on Step 3

passed_tests: 1. test_dcf_valuation_calculation - DCF produces correct output with projections and sensitivity
2. test_nav_valuation_calculation - NAV produces correct output with adjustments
3. test_comparable_valuation_calculation - CCM produces correct output with peer multiples
4. test_ddm_valuation_with_dividends - DDM produces correct output for dividend-paying companies
5. test_ddm_valuation_no_dividends - DDM correctly handles no-dividend case with warning
6. test_financial_ratios_calculation - All ratios calculated correctly (EBITDA margin, ROE, CAGR, etc.)
14. test_07_run_valuation_calculation - POST /api/valuation/projects/{id}/calculate runs all methods with AI analysis
15. test_08_verify_completed_project - Project status changes to completed

landing_page_module_card.description: 5th module card 'Business Valuation' with amber Scale icon

sidebar_navigation.description: Valuation nav item in sidebar navigates to /valuation

disclaimer_dialog.description: Disclaimer shown on entry with IPO Labs AI-assisted warning

wizard_4_steps.description: 4-step wizard with progress bar (Company Profile -> Financial Data -> Valuation Config -> Run Valuation)

step1_company_profile.description: Company name, industry (21 options), purpose (5 options), currency, company type, description

step2_financial_data.description: 14 financial metrics table across 3+ years, shares outstanding, face value

step3_valuation_config.description: Method selection (DCF/NAV/CCM/DDM) with per-method config and weights

step4_run_valuation.description: Generate Valuation Report button triggers calculation

results_page.description: Rich dashboard with hero card, confidence score, DCF/NAV/Comparable results, risk assessment, regulatory compliance, tax implications, quality control

dcf_calculation.description: FCFF projections, terminal value, sensitivity analysis, WACC-based discounting

nav_calculation.description: Book value adjustments, going concern NAV, liquidation NAV, illiquidity discount

comparable_calculation.description: Peer multiples (P/E, EV/EBITDA, P/B, EV/Sales), median calculation

ddm_calculation.description: Gordon Growth Model for dividend-paying companies

ai_analysis.description: GPT-5.2 powered regulatory, risk, tax, and quality control analysis

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: ValuationWizard.jsx was missing Badge import causing runtime error on Step 3
Valuation engine correctly implements DCF, NAV, Comparable, and DDM methods
AI analysis (GPT-5.2) provides detailed regulatory, risk, tax, and quality control insights
All CRUD endpoints properly authenticated and working
Results page displays comprehensive valuation report with all required sections
test_credentials: Test user created dynamically and cleaned up after tests
seed_data_creation: None required - tests use API directly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Automated Business Valuation module fully tested. Backend valuation engine (valuation_engine.py) has 4 methods: DCF, NAV, Comparable, DDM. All API endpoints at /api/valuation/projects/* working with auth. Frontend wizard has 4 steps. Results page shows comprehensive report with AI-powered analysis. Badge import bug was fixed in ValuationWizard.jsx. GPT-5.2 is used for regulatory, risk, tax, and quality control analysis.
